raw_consumer_statement:
We were mistakenly charged {$49.00} from Best Buy and never received a statement. Not being aware of the purchase on our Best Buy/City Bank card , we didnt make a payment and we were charged late fees and interest charges. We called Best Buy and City Bank multiple times and received the worst customer service. Within a few days after the late status, our account was sent to collections and we received a voicemail stating that fact. All this because of a purchase that we never approved! We have dealt with multiple credit card companies and were never treated like this before. 
This is a fraudulent business practice of Best Buy charging an account without the consumer approval.
